allow: Bash(python3 -c " import json, sys with open\('C:/Users/Sanyam/.claude/projects/d--Projects-gym-saas/b6e0a562-3591-45cd-8223-ad35d75f5c7b.jsonl', encoding='utf-8'\) as f: lines = f.readlines\(\) obj = json.loads\(lines[2]\) msg = obj.get\('message', {}\) content = msg.get\('content', ''\) if isinstance\(content, list\): for c in content: if isinstance\(c, dict\) and c.get\('type'\) == 'text': sys.stdout.buffer.write\(c['text'].encode\('utf-8'\)\) ")
